project_title: Library Book Borrowing and Reservation System

functional_requirements.statement: Allow members to search for books
acceptance_criteria: Members can search by title, author, or ISBN
Search results are displayed within 3 seconds

functional_requirements.statement: Allow members to borrow available books
acceptance_criteria: Members can borrow a maximum of five books
Book status updates to borrowed

functional_requirements.statement: Allow members to reserve unavailable books
acceptance_criteria: Reservation is added to member's account
Members receive notification when book becomes available

functional_requirements.statement: Allow members to view their loans, due dates, and reservations
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard displays current loans and due dates
Reservation status is visible

functional_requirements.statement: Allow librarians to add new books
acceptance_criteria: New book details are saved to system
Book appears in search results

functional_requirements.statement: Allow librarians to update book records
acceptance_criteria: Book details can be edited
Changes reflect in search results immediately

functional_requirements.statement: Allow librarians to mark books as borrowed or returned
acceptance_criteria: Book status is updated accurately
Borrowing history is recorded

functional_requirements.statement: Allow librarians to manage overdue items
acceptance_criteria: Librarian can view and update overdue items
Notifications sent to members

functional_requirements.statement: Prevent members from borrowing more than five books
acceptance_criteria: System blocks borrowing if limit exceeded
Members receive notification if limit is reached

functional_requirements.statement: Send notifications for available reservations and overdue books
acceptance_criteria: Email or SMS notifications are sent to members
Notifications are sent within 1 hour of status change
Users must log in to access their account
Session management for security

functional_requirements.statement: Keep a record of key actions
acceptance_criteria: Actions like borrowing, returning, reservation updates are logged
Logs accessible to librarians

functional_requirements.statement: Allow only librarians to remove books from the catalogue
acceptance_criteria: Librarian can successfully delete book record
Deleted books do not appear in search results

non_functional_requirements.statement: System should return search results within 3 seconds under normal usage
The system interface should be intuitive for all user roles

assumptions: Members have valid email addresses for notifications
clarification_questions: What specific user roles need to be defined beyond 'Member' and 'Librarian'?
What is considered 'normal usage' for the system's performance requirements?

glossary.definition: An individual with a library account who can borrow and reserve books
A staff member with permissions to manage the library's catalogue and assist members
